title: The Price of Bonney’s Freedom
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Luffy, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, World Government as Kuma’s life, Bonney’s childhood, and the cost of Saturn and the World Government’s cruelty reach their emotional center.
scene: Kuma’s life, Bonney’s childhood, and the cost of Saturn and the World Government’s cruelty reach their emotional center.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Egghead, New World

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: This is unsettling.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You think so?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Their progression is going as smoothly as your own modifications.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nevermind that though, did you hear the news? Apparently, some cookies declared war on the world government!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Dragon has a son?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I'm going to let you study all my memories, there's no point trying to hide it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A man with rubber powers standing up to the government. What a quick of fate.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: He sounds just like my idol, Nika.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: PE PE PE! That's true!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Thriller bark, Grand Line

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The government has given me special orders to wipe you all out...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That said, I'm sure they'd be satisfied if I only brought them straw hat Luffy's head...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hand him over, and I'll spare your lives.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Go to Hell!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What a shame.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: URSUS SHOCK.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Luffy is the man...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...who will become King of the Pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you truly mean to take his place...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...you must be willing to bear all his pain and suffering yourself.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This much damage might be enough to even knock me out...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He has exceptional friends.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Just as I'd expect of your son...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Dragon,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Near the Sabaody archipelago

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We are calling in all seven warlords of the sea!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you refuse to come, you'll be forfeiting your title!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Quite the statement... What's the occasion?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The flag-bearer of the new era, Portgas D. Ace...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: His public execution date has been set.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This will mean war with the Whitebeard Pirates!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: war? With the white- beard?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will be sure to arrive before the execution date.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Saboody archipelago

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Where's my food?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'm Wastin' away here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Pizza!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: BRING!! ME!! MORE!! NOOOW!!!

summary: This part advances the Kuma and Bonney Flashback through 40 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
